task_description: Add a Modal sandbox backend for vime coding_agent_rl: implement ModalSandbox satisfying the Sandbox Protocol, add make_sandbox() factory + swap 2 E2BSandbox call sites, add ADAPTER_URL_OVERRIDE in generate.py. Reverse-network via cloudflared tunnel (empirically validated 2026-06-07). Then write extensive unit tests and run in-container e2e on real Modal. Route A.2.

write_policy.debug_good_bad_anchors: append state_anchor events; projection is agent_run/bisect.md
write_policy.project_level_scripts: symlink or wrapper only; canonical script stays under agent_run/scripts/

compact_recovery: Use agent_run_dir as the durable state root, even if CWD is a nested worktree.
Append events through scripts/agent_run.py event ... --project whenever possible.
Run scripts/agent_run.py doctor --repo-root project_root before a handoff.
